title: Purple Velvet Ribbon for Gift Wrapping 1.5 inch(38mm) x 10 Yards Single-Sided Thick Purple Ribbon for Christmas Tree Hair Bows Décor Party Crafts DIY Florist
features: 🎀Premium Velvet Texture: Crafted from single-sided velvet, this Foshird Purple velvet ribbon offers a soft, luxurious feel that adds elegance to any project. The Purple color remains vibrant over time and is easy to cut and shape to your needs.

✨ Perfect for Large Bows – 1 roll of premium velvet ribbon in a rich Purple shade, featuring a generous 1.5 inch (38mm) width for bold and elegant decorative results. The wide design makes this ribbon ideal for creating statement bows for gift wrapping, wreaths, chair sashes, or party decorations.
📏 Ample Length for Projects – Each roll measures 10 yards (≈9.14m), giving you enough ribbon to handle multiple wide-format crafts and decorative applications.

💡Durable & Easy to Handle: This Foshird Purple velvet ribbon is easy to cut to the desired length and doesn't fray easily, ensuring your projects stay neat. The fade-resistant material of Foshird dark Purple velvet ribbon also guarantees long-lasting beauty for your crafts and decorations.

🎉Multi-Purpose Use: Whether you're creating Purple velvet hair bow, adding finishing touches to gift warpping, or designing DIY decorations, this classic Purple velvet ribbon is ideal. It's also perfect for cake ribbon, hair ribbon, florist ribbon, handmade flowers, fashion accessories, and party decorations for events like birthdays or weddings.
description: Add a luxurious touch to your crafts and decorations with Foshird Purple Velvet Ribbon! Available in both 10mm and 20mm widths, each roll is made of single-sided velvet that provides a soft, rich texture. With a total of 10 yards per roll, you'll have plenty of Purple Velvet Ribbon to bring your creative ideas to life. The classic burgundy color offers timeless elegance, perfect for any occasion, from birthdays and weddings to DIY home décor projects. Whether you're designing hair accessories, gift wrapping, or creating party decorations, this versatile dark Purple velvet ribbon is ideal for adding a sophisticated flair!
